query: SELECT id, name, imageUrl FROM recipes WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '' ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3N8WHcqSjo6gJV1.8cb8a16f7acb --database ndjzMo7PxeapbzLjBHjsKj --execute SELECT id, name, imageUrl FROM recipes WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '' ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 20;
